summary: Fix 7 failing tests in services/policy-service/ caused by database schema constraints (organization_id NOT NULL), type assertion issues in rule operators (In/Between), missing test fixture data, and invalid UUID values

user_stories.i_want: all policy service tests to pass
user_stories.so_that: the policy engine codebase is stable and reliable for future development
acceptance_criteria: Response JSON correctly formatted with policies array
In and Between operators evaluate correctly

user_stories.i_want: organization_id to be nullable in the database
user_stories.so_that: global policies can exist without being tied to a specific organization
acceptance_criteria: Database migration creates organization_id as nullable
Existing policies without organization_id are valid
Tests can create policies without specifying organization

user_stories.i_want: rule operators In and Between to handle both typed slices and interface slices
user_stories.so_that: JSON unmarshaling differences don't break rule evaluation
acceptance_criteria: Tests for In and Between operators pass

functional_requirements.title: Nullable organization_id Column
functional_requirements.description: Modify the print_policies table to allow NULL values for organization_id to support global/system-wide policies that apply to all organizations

functional_requirements.title: Fix In Operator Type Handling
functional_requirements.description: Update compareIn function to handle both []interface{} and strongly-typed slices ([]string, []int) by using reflection or JSON marshaling for comparison

functional_requirements.title: Fix Between Operator Type Handling
functional_requirements.description: Update compareBetween function to handle both []interface{} and strongly-typed slices ([]int, []float64) for range comparisons

functional_requirements.title: Fix Test Fixture Data
functional_requirements.description: Update TestEngineAppliesToScope to include DocumentType in EvaluationContext and document DocumentType in scope tests

functional_requirements.title: Fix ModifiedBy UUID Validation
functional_requirements.description: Update TestRepositoryUpdate to use valid UUID for ModifiedBy field instead of 'admin' string

functional_requirements.title: Ensure Response JSON Encoding
functional_requirements.description: Verify policiesHandler returns properly formatted JSON with policies as an array that can be decoded as []interface{}

functional_requirements.title: Secure Print Release
functional_requirements.description: Require authentication at the printer device before releasing jobs via PIN, card, or mobile app
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Must-have for enterprise security, prevents sensitive documents from being left uncollected

functional_requirements.title: Follow-Me Printing
functional_requirements.description: Queue jobs to a virtual pool, release at any available printer with authentication
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Reduces printer wait times, enables load balancing, standard feature in all major competitors

functional_requirements.title: Content Filtering/DLP
functional_requirements.description: Filter print jobs containing sensitive data patterns (SSN, credit card, confidential markers) with configurable policies
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Critical for healthcare/finance/government, strong differentiator in regulated industries

functional_requirements.title: Mobile Print Apps
functional_requirements.description: Native iOS and Android apps for submitting jobs, releasing prints, and managing queue
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Essential for modern workforce, all major competitors offer this

functional_requirements.title: Advanced Cost Allocation
functional_requirements.description: Per-department, per-project, per-client cost tracking with detailed reporting and chargeback capabilities
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Key for professional services, legal, and education markets

functional_requirements.title: Policy Templates Marketplace
functional_requirements.description: Pre-built policy templates for HIPAA, GDPR, ISO27001, FedRAMP compliance
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Reduces implementation time, demonstrates compliance expertise

non_functional_requirements.requirement: UUID validation must be enforced for user references (created_by, modified_by)
non_functional_requirements.metric: Invalid UUID strings rejected at API boundary

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Rule evaluation must complete within 10ms for typical policies with < 10 rules
Test coverage must be maintained above 80% for policy engine code

api_endpoints.description: List all policies with optional filtering by type, status, organization_id
Create a new policy with rules, actions, and scope
Evaluate print request against all active policies

risks.risk: Making organization_id nullable could break existing queries that assume NOT NULL
risks.mitigation: Review all queries using organization_id and add IS NULL checks where needed

risks.risk: Type assertion changes could introduce subtle bugs in rule evaluation
risks.mitigation: Add comprehensive unit tests for all operator types with various input formats

risks.risk: Migration to alter column could fail on production with existing data
risks.mitigation: Test migration on staging first, ensure no existing policies violate new constraints

implementation_phases.name: Database Schema Fix
tasks: Create migration to make organization_id nullable in print_policies table
Verify existing policies still work with nullable organization_id

implementation_phases.name: Fix Type Assertion Issues
tasks: Update compareIn function to handle strongly-typed slices
Update compareBetween function to handle strongly-typed slices
Add helper function for slice comparison using JSON marshaling

implementation_phases.name: Fix Test Fixtures
tasks: Update TestEngineAppliesToScope with DocumentType in evalCtx
Update TestRepositoryUpdate with valid UUID for ModifiedBy

implementation_phases.name: Validation
tasks: Run all policy-service tests and verify 100% pass rate

unique_selling_points: Cloud-native microservices architecture enabling independent scaling and deployment flexibility
True multi-tenancy with data isolation at service layer (not just application level)
Open-source with transparent security and no vendor lock-in
Modern Go-based stack with OpenTelemetry observability built-in
Comprehensive compliance service tracking multiple standards simultaneously
M365-first integration design for Microsoft-centric enterprises
Policy engine with flexible rule evaluation supporting complex conditions
Developer-first with API gateway and extensible plugin architecture
